overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking up a rocky mountain trail at night toward the Sanctuary of Mt. Zas, accompanied by mountain goats. The scene features Mediterranean mountain terrain with ancient Greek ruins under a starry sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the mountain path between rock formations

entered.detail: large limestone cliff face with layered rock formations
tall palm tree with broad leaves silhouetted against night sky
narrow winding dirt path through rocky terrain
large rocks and boulders scattered along the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through rocky mountain terrain at night. The path winds between large rock formations and sparse vegetation under a starry sky, with palm trees visible on the right.

events.description: torch light becomes visible ahead illuminating the path
mountain goats appear on the trail ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing up the path toward the light source where goats are grazing

notable_agents.action: mountain goat standing on the path ahead looking toward the character
second goat grazing near the rocks beside the trail

entered.detail: bright torch fire illuminating the path ahead on the hillside
large rocky outcrop with bushes growing on top

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a torch light illuminating the path ahead. Mountain goats appear on the trail, standing and grazing near the rocky edges as the path becomes more enclosed by vegetation and rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper mountain trail with sanctuary view

events.description: ancient stone sanctuary ruins become visible on the hilltop ahead

agents.ego_description: climbing the steeper section of trail with goats walking alongside

notable_agents.action: goat walking ahead of the character on the narrow path
goat standing on the rocks to the right watching the character pass

entered.detail: ancient stone sanctuary structure with walls visible on the hilltop
standing stone columns of the ancient Greek temple

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steeper section of the mountain trail with goats walking alongside. The stone ruins of the Sanctuary of Mt. Zas become visible on the hilltop ahead against the night sky, with ancient columns silhouetted in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sanctuary summit with ancient stone platform

events.description: historical location discovery notification appears for Sanctuary of Mt. Zas

agents.ego_description: slowing down as approaching the sanctuary entrance and stone platform

notable_agents.action: goat walking alongside the character toward the sanctuary

entered.detail: flat stone platform forming the base of the sanctuary entrance
tall standing stone column with capital on the left side of the path
tall standing stone column with capital on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the summit where the Sanctuary of Mt. Zas stands. A discovery notification appears on screen as the character reaches the ancient stone platform with standing columns, while goats continue to graze nearby under the moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a winding mountain trail at night toward the illuminated ruins of an ancient sanctuary. It begins with the character navigating a dirt path between large rock formations and sparse palm trees under a vast starry sky. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed by vegetation and rock, with the warm glow of a torch appearing ahead and mountain goats emerging to graze along the trail. The scene then shifts to a steeper climb where the goats walk alongside the character, gradually revealing the silhouetted columns of the Sanctuary of Mt. Zas on the hilltop. Finally, the camera reaches the summit as a discovery notification appears, opening up to the ancient stone platform and standing columns under the moonlight.
